name: small law firms processing 5–15 legal files/month tool
description: For small law firms processing 5–15 legal files/month, inefficient management causes compliance risks. We digitize and organize legal files instead of manual filing systems or basic digital storage solutions.
target_audience: small law firms processing 5–15 legal files/month
